programme_hints: Page 26 consists entirely of reference photography showing urban residential courtyard typologies: green inner courtyards, planted walkways, mixed-use mid-rise residential buildings, and landscaped shared outdoor spaces. These appear to be inspirational/reference images for the Nieuw Legmeer beeldkwaliteitplan, suggesting an emphasis on green, high-quality shared courtyards and landscape integration within residential blocks.
urban_intent_passages: Reference imagery shows green inner courtyards with planting, residential buildings with varied facades, and pedestrian-friendly shared outdoor spaces — indicative of the urban design ambitions for Nieuw Legmeer.
